data.title: AI TRENDS | UK Envoy Naz Shah Visits Sarawak to Discuss AI, Energy, and Sustainable Development
data.description:
A UK delegation led by British lawmaker and UK Trade Envoy to ASEAN Naz Shah visited Kuching, Sarawak, and met Sarawak Premier Abang Johari to discuss Sarawak’s progress in AI, energy, and sustainable economic development. According to Foresight News, the visit was reported by the Sarawak government’s official news outlet.

FLock.io’s head of institutional development Mohammed (Mo) Marikar and Sarawak Artificial Intelligence Centre (SAIC) CEO Prof. Patrick Then also attended the discussions.

The trip followed a memorandum of understanding signed between the UK and Sarawak in Manchester, with talks covering sovereign AI, the energy transition, and sustainable development.

FLock.io and SAIC said they completed a federated-learning-based fine-tuning practice for an indigenous language large language model in February. FLock.io said decentralized AI and federated learning could be used to locally train, deploy, and govern domain-specific AI systems for Sarawak in areas including public services, energy, healthcare, and agriculture.

FLock.io also cited its prior involvement in a Manchester green sovereign AI infrastructure collaboration, a University of Cambridge partnership on AI economics and policy research, and a University of Oxford roundtable on sovereign AI governance, safety, verification, and trusted deployment.

data.title: WORLD CUP | England-Mexico last-16 ticket resale starts at £2,622 at Estadio Azteca
data.description: England fans seeking tickets for the World Cup last-16 match against Mexico at the Estadio Azteca face paying at least £2,622 per seat on FIFA’s resale site, with limited supply and high demand in Mexico City. England set up the tie with a 2-1 win over DR Congo on Wednesday, and the match kicks off at 01:00 BST on Monday, according to Yahoo Sports.

data.title: WORLD CUP | England’s 2-1 win over DR Congo triggers record mobile traffic spikes in UK
data.description: Millions of fans streaming England’s 2-1 World Cup win over the Democratic Republic of Congo during a 5pm kickoff drove record mobile data surges on the UK’s biggest networks, with EE reporting an all-time peak 42% above average Wednesday levels and O2 posting its biggest spike, 20.4% higher than its previous record. O2 said overall mobile traffic was 27.7% above an average week and BBC iPlayer traffic rose 380% versus a typical weekday afternoon, while MRI Software data showed UK footfall up 7.4% week on week on Wednesday, including a 15% rise on high streets and a 46.7% increase in London, according to Yahoo Sports.

data.title: WORLD CUP | Tuchel urges parents to let children watch England vs Mexico at 1am BST
data.description: England manager Thomas Tuchel urged parents to let school children stay up to watch England’s next World Cup match against Mexico, which kicks off at 1am BST at the Azteca Stadium. England reached the last 16 after Harry Kane scored twice against DR Congo on Wednesday (1 July), according to Yahoo Sports.

data.title: Bosch-Backed Leou Bohua Technology Established in Shanghai With RMB200 Million Capital
data.description: Leou Bohua Technology (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. has been established in Shanghai with registered capital of RMB200 million, according to 36Kr. Tianyancha data shows the company’s legal representative is Zhu Tao, and its business scope includes manufacturing and sales of power electronic components and electric motor manufacturing. The company is jointly owned by Robert Bosch Internationale Beteiligungen AG, Xi’an Yifu Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd., and Bosch (China) Investment Ltd.

data.title: PBOC Reports June 2026 Liquidity Operations: MLF Net Injection 200 Billion Yuan
data.description:
The People’s Bank of China (PBOC) released data on its liquidity operations for June 2026, showing a net injection of 200 billion yuan via the medium-term lending facility (MLF), according to 36Kr. Other structural monetary policy tools recorded a net withdrawal of 137.2 billion yuan.

In open market operations, the PBOC posted a net injection of 10 billion yuan through outright government bond trading, a net injection of 582.6 billion yuan via 7-day reverse repos, and a net injection of 300 billion yuan through reverse repos of other tenors.

data.title: Zhongkai Xinneng Sets Up Wind Power Unit in Hezhou With RMB 47 Million Capital
data.description: Zhongkai Xinneng Wind Power (Hezhou) Co., Ltd. has been established recently with registered capital of RMB 47 million and Wang Haoying as legal representative, according to 36Kr. Tianyancha data shows the company’s business scope includes wind power technology services, energy storage technology services, solar power technology services, and power generation technology services. The new entity is wholly owned by Zhongkai Xinneng Holding (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd., which is itself a wholly owned subsidiary of China Nanshan Development (Group) Co., Ltd.

data.title: Zhongke Maidi Digital Intelligence Tech Partnership Set Up in Suzhou With RMB 9.8 Million Capital
data.description: Zhongke Maidi Digital Intelligence Technology (Suzhou) Partnership (Limited Partnership) has been established recently, with Zhongke Maidi Artificial Intelligence Research Institute (Suzhou) Co., Ltd. serving as the executive partner and a registered capital contribution of RMB 9.8 million, according to 36Kr. Tianyancha data shows the partnership’s business scope includes technology promotion services and enterprise management consulting. Partner information lists Yang Jianglin and Zhongke Maidi Artificial Intelligence Research Institute (Suzhou) Co., Ltd. as contributors.

data.title: S&P 500 Trades Sideways Ahead of U.S. Jobs Report as Traders Watch Dip-Buying Opportunities
data.description:
The S&P 500 index traded in a choppy, consolidating range ahead of Thursday’s U.S. nonfarm payrolls release, with traders watching for dip-buying opportunities, risks tied to a triangle pattern, and a possible move toward 7,600.

According to Jin10, the index saw sharp swings on Wednesday, which analysts said was understandable because markets had already moved somewhat ahead of the jobs data.

Analysts said any selling during Thursday’s session—unless the United States releases an unusually strong employment report—would be viewed as a chance to buy on dips.

The market expects 114,000 jobs to be added and the unemployment rate to be 4.3%. The focus is on how closely the actual figures match expectations.

The report could be a relatively uneventful event, with the data potentially confirming what is already known: the U.S. economy is still operating. Analysts said a short-term pullback could represent a potential buying opportunity.

data.title: Binance Says Bitcoin Learn & Earn Rewards Will Continue in July 2026 With 0.00001 BTC Vouchers
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, Binance Academy said the Bitcoin Learn & Earn rewards have been replenished for the month of July 2026, allowing eligible new users to complete an optional quiz and receive 0.00001 BTC in token vouchers. The activity period is set to run from 2026-07-01 00:00 (UTC) until further notice, with rewards available on a first-come, first-served basis to the first 5,000 new users each month. Binance Academy stated that participation will close for that month once all rewards are distributed, and that rewards are expected to be renewed each month.

Eligibility and Reward Details: Binance said the offer applies to eligible new users who registered on Binance after 2026-07-01 00:00 (UTC) and complete the Learn & Earn quiz with all correct answers. Each user can complete the Learn & Earn only once and claim a maximum of one reward. Distribution and Validity: Binance said token voucher rewards will be distributed within 48 hours to qualified learners who pass the quiz, and the token voucher validity period is set at 14 days from the day of distribution.

data.title: STOCKS | BlackRock Raises Long Position in ZTE H Shares to 7.10%
data.description:
BlackRock increased its long position in ZTE Corp.’s H shares to 7.10% on June 25, up from 6.52%, according to Hong Kong Stock Exchange filings.

According to Odaily, the disclosure relates to ZTE’s H shares listed under ticker 00763.HK.

data.title: Warren Urges Fed’s Waller to Halt Work on Reserve Bank Proposal
data.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren asked Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller to halt his efforts to overhaul operations at the central bank’s 12 regional branches, according to Bloomberg.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Kingsoft Cloud Speeds Up GPU Computing Buildout as Xiaomi Budget Tops 10 Billion Yuan
data.description:
Kingsoft Cloud is set to accelerate construction of its GPU computing clusters in the second half of the year to meet surging demand from major clients.

According to Jin10, Xiaomi’s GPU computing demand at Kingsoft Cloud has upgraded from a 10,000-GPU cluster to a super-large-scale computing cluster, with the related investment budget rising from nearly 4 billion yuan to more than 10 billion yuan.

The report also said Alibaba’s large-model team has signed a five-year computing-power leasing contract with Kingsoft Cloud covering more than 3,000 eight-GPU servers. Based on the monthly rental price at the time of signing, the report estimated that after full delivery the monthly revenue run rate would be about 300 million yuan, with annualized revenue exceeding 4 billion yuan.

data.title: Brazil Rail Operator VLI Opens New Route to Boost Soybean Meal Exports
data.description:
Brazilian railway operator VLI SA is starting a new export route for soybean meal as Brazil seeks to increase shipments of the animal feed ingredient, according to Bloomberg.

The new route is aimed at easing key logistics bottlenecks affecting exports.

data.title: STOCKS | HKTVmall Founder Ricky Wong Raises HK Technology Venture Stake to 46.65%
data.description:
Equity disclosure filings show HKTVmall founder Ricky Wong Wai-kei increased his stake in Hong Kong Technology Venture Co. (1137) to 46.65% from 46.55%, according to Ming Pao.

Wong bought 201,000 shares on June 29 and 595,000 shares on June 30, both at an average price of HK$1.08 per share.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 61,000 USDT with a 3.74% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jul 02, 2026, 09:42 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 61,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 61,088.871094 USDT, with a narrowed 3.74% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: SpaceX-Linked Token Drops Over 10% on Hyperliquid as Thin Float Amplifies Sell-Off
data.description:
A SpaceX (SPCX) token continued its pullback on July 2, falling more than 10.3% in a single day on a CEX (centralized exchange) derivatives venue, trading at $156.93 and about 22% below its record high of $225.64 set on June 16. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the token recorded $338 million in trading volume over the past 24 hours and $178 million in open interest, ranking behind only Micron and SK Hynix among single-stock targets on the platform.

The decline was described as part of a broader AI supply-chain sell-off triggered by Meta Compute. Market watchers cited the token’s extremely thin public float—about 4% to 5%—as a factor that may have amplified selling pressure, alongside concerns about high valuation and an upcoming 20% token unlock. These factors could offset optimism tied to a planned Nasdaq inclusion on July 6.

The thin-float structure was also said to increase the influence of crypto-market capital on price action. Over the past trading day, total crypto-market trading volume in SPCX-related contracts reached $2.4 billion. Using Nasdaq’s $16.2 billion in SpaceX trading volume over the same period as a reference, the crypto-market volume, including leveraged activity, was estimated at about 14.8% of that figure.

Among large on-chain position holders, the average long entry price was about $164.16, leaving long traders overall in unrealized losses. The largest long position on Hyperliquid was highlighted as the most exposed.

That whale was reported to be long 86,748.6 contracts at 10x leverage, with a position size of $13.62 million, an average entry near $164, and a liquidation price of $148—about 5.7% below the current price. The position showed an unrealized loss of $370,000.

data.title: STOCKS | Southbound Funds Post Net Sell of 1.97 Billion Yuan
data.description:
Southbound funds recorded a net sell of 1.97 billion yuan today. According to Jin10, via Shanghai Stock Connect, Kingboard Laminates and Hua Hong Semiconductor saw net sells of HK$926 million and HK$677 million, respectively, while Alibaba-W led net buys at HK$896 million.

Via Shenzhen Stock Connect, SMIC and Hua Hong Semiconductor posted net sells of HK$1.21 billion and HK$1.04 billion, respectively, while GigaDevice led net buys at HK$123 million.

data.title: STOCKS | Fulaixin Materials Says Flexible Sensor Project Revenue Was 1.82 Million Yuan, With Minimal Share of Total Revenue
data.description:
Fulaixin Materials issued an abnormal trading announcement after its stock recorded a cumulative deviation of more than 20% in closing-price gains over three consecutive trading days on June 30, 2026, July 1, and July 2.

According to Jin10, the company said its main businesses include advertising inkjet printing materials, label and signage printing materials, electronic-grade functional materials, functional base film materials, and adhesive materials, among other industrial consumer products.

The company said it has noticed heightened market attention to the humanoid robot concept. After an internal review, it said that as of the disclosure date of the announcement, revenue from its flexible sensor project was 1.82 million yuan and unaudited.

It added that this revenue accounted for a very small proportion of the company’s overall revenue and had no material impact on its main business.

data.title: Beijing Tower Crash Was Deliberate Act by Pilot, Probe Finds
data.description: Chinese authorities said the pilot who crashed a small plane into Beijing’s tallest skyscraper acted deliberately, offering the first official explanation nearly a week after the incident, according to Bloomberg.
